mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stu_info(stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score) VALUES(#{stuNo}, #{stuName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{className}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{score})
mapper.update: UPDATE stu_info SET stu_name = #{stuName}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, class_name = #{className}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, score = #{score} WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo}
mapper.select: SELECT id, stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score FROM stu_info WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo}
SELECT id, stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score FROM stu_info WHERE stu_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stu_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score FROM stu_info ORDER BY id DESC
